sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal (kindred to שָׁמַם).

Hiphil הִשְׁמִיד to destroy-(a) to lay waste cities, altars, Lev 26:30 Num 33:52. More frequently-(b) to destroy persons and peoples, Deu 1:27 2:12 , 21 , 22 , 23 Est 3:6. Inf. הַשְׁמֵד subst. destruction, Isa 14:23.

Niphal, pass.-

(1) to be laid waste, as a field, Jer 48:8 hills, Hos 10:8.

(2) to be destroyed, cut off, of peoples, Deu 4:26 28:20 and of individuals, Gen 34:30 Psa 37:38.
